normalized_requirements.raw_text: Powerheal 4000 Lens Phase 2 Item Level 127 Binds when picked up Head Cloth 174 Armor +14 Stamina +38 Intellect +28 Spirit Meta Socket Blue Socket Socket Bonus: +9 Healing and +3 Spell Damage Durability 60 / 60 Requires Level 62 Requires Engineering (350) Equip: Increases healing done by up to 101 and damage done by up to 34 for all magical spells and effects. Equip: Shows the location of all nearby gas clouds on the minimap. Equip: Slightly increases your stealth detection. Use: Allows you to look far into the distance.
